title: Ruhroh Smoke
description: Small, fast real-user coding-agent checks for install validation and adapter bring-up.

methodology.retryPolicy: Do not retry failed agent runs inside a sample. Re-run the full sample only for documented infrastructure failures.

acceptanceCriteria: Scenario must be realistic enough to exercise a complete delivered workspace.
Scenario must run without public network access.
Rubric must judge outcome behavior rather than required filenames or source text.
governance.contaminationReview: Smoke scenarios should be original and small; do not include public canonical solutions.
governance.rewardHackingReview: Review prompts and rubrics for filename-only or static-content shortcuts. Smoke tasks may be small, but must still require a complete delivered workspace.
reviewChecklist: Confirm the task exercises a full agent loop from user request to final workspace.
Confirm the evaluator can reject a static placeholder or copied prompt text.
Confirm artifacts are enough to diagnose an adapter bring-up failure.
governance.deprecationPolicy: Keep the latest smoke suite stable within a major version. Replace scenarios only in a new suiteVersion with changelog notes.
